task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event for this Saturday at 0h with the title 'Appointment for Campaign' and the description 'We will understand upcoming project milestones.'. The event should last for 45 mins.

steps.thought:

[Plan]

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the target app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not on the current home screen page. Since the task requires creating an event in this specific app, I need to launch it first. I will execute an open operation for "Simple Calendar Pro".

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a monthly view for October. Today's date is highlighted as Sunday, October 15th. The upcoming Saturday in the current week is October 21st. A floating action button with a '+' icon is visible in the bottom right corner.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to Saturday's date (or directly create event via '+' button) → | Step 3: Fill in event details (title, description, time 0h, duration 45 mins) | Step 4: Save the event

To start creating a new event, I can either select the date 21st first or just tap the '+' button to initiate the creation process. Since the '+' button is readily available on the screen, I will tap it to open the new event creation screen.

[Replan]

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the menu expanded to offer "Task" and "Event". The goal is to create a calendar event, so I must select the "Event" button. I will tap the "Event" button to proceed to the event creation screen.

[Memory]
Target event details: Date: Saturday (Oct 21st), Time: 0h, Duration: 45 mins, Title: 'Appointment for Campaign', Description: 'We will understand upcoming project milestones.'. Current view is October calendar, target date is Oct 21st.

The screen is on the "New Event" creation page. The current default date is set to October 15 (Sun), and the time is 16:00. The keyboard is active. The "Title" input field is at the top, currently empty. Other fields like "Location" and "Description" are also visible.

The previous plan expected to select the target date (Saturday, Oct 21st) in Step 3. However, since the keyboard is already open and the "Title" field is at the top, it's more efficient to fill in the text fields first before changing the date and time. I will adjust the plan to prioritize text input first.

[Replan]
Step 1-2: Open app and select 'Event' ✓ | Step 3: Fill in event details (title, description) → | Step 4: Set date to Saturday (Oct 21st), time to 0h, duration 45 mins | Step 5: Save the event
